agents.stat_runs_today_sub: Agent runs in the last 24 h

workflows.stat_runs_today_sub: Workflow runs in the last 24 h
workflows.delete_confirm: Delete workflow "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

automations.empty_desc: Create rules that run agents, workflows or feeders on a schedule, manually or by context.

agent_editor.subtitle: Define the agent's identity, instructions and capabilities.
agent_editor.mcp_hint: MCP servers this agent can use on top of Dome's native tools.
agent_editor.mcp_empty: No MCP servers configured. Add them in Settings → MCP to attach them here.
agent_editor.mcp_settings_hint: Each MCP's tools are toggled globally in Settings → MCP.
agent_editor.tip_role: Start the instructions by defining the agent's role and tone.
agent_editor.tip_tools: Don't enumerate tools — the agent already knows its tools at runtime.
agent_editor.tip_skills: Skills in ~/.dome/skills are automatically available to every agent.

automation_editor.summary_feeder_output: The feeder updates its artifact directly

agent_prompt_runs: Review my recent runs: highlight failures, bottlenecks, and 3 concrete next actions.
agent_prompt_automations: Review my automations: suggest which to enable, fix failing ones, and propose one new useful rule.
agent_prompt_agents: Review my agents library and propose improvements or a new agent for a recurring task.
agent_prompt_workflows: Review my workflows and suggest a practical next workflow or canvas improvements.
agent_prompt_pipelines: Review my pipelines boards and suggest stages, card triage, or automation hooks.
